article.title: Is DFS not optimal solution?
article.content:
In recent interview with uber, I was asked to solve this
https://leetcode.com/problems/word-ladder/

I have solved it using DFS and DP, all test cases passed, but the feedback was not positive, is DFS approach for this question / related questions to find the min path length non optimal solutions?

Any info on interviewers inside uber / experts would help.

I went with this approach because DFS is easy to implement and debug for me incase of issues.

post.content: shortest transformation sequence - pretty much needs BFS for optimal solution
BFS is what they were going for for shortest path. DFS requires you to backtrack a lot while BFS stops as soon as the condition is met.
